title: oenothera longissima var. clutei
intro: Oenothera longissima var. clutei, also known as Clute's evening primrose, is a perennial plant belonging to the Onagraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of essential fatty acids and antioxidants, which have anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Oenothera longissima var. clutei include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, improve skin health, and support cardiovascular well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as capsules or oil extracts, are often used to promote overall health and wellness, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
